description:
Renewing your health insurance policy on time is essential to keep your coverage active and avoid any gaps in protection.

 Forgetting or delaying policy renewal can result in unexpected costs during medical emergencies. 

By following these simple steps, you can maintain continuous coverage and avoid the stress of dealing with lapses when you need your health insurance the most.

WATCH OUR VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)

comments.text: Dear mam, मुझे अपने पैरेंट के हेल्थ इंश्योरेंस पॉलिसी को लेके इश्यू है। एक्चुअली ये पॉलिसी बैंक के थ्रू उनके अकाउंट होल्डर को रिबेट रेट पे स्टार हेल्थ इंश्योरेंस कंपनी से इश्यू किया गया है। अभी उस बैंक का उस इंश्योरेंस कंपनी के साथ टाई अप नहीं रहा और उस इंश्योरेंस कंपनी का क्लेम सेटलमेंट इश्यू भी बहुत सुनने को मिला है। तो में आपसे जानना चाहता हूं कि उस कंपनी के साथ पॉलिसी रिनिवल करना चाहिए या नहीं। पॉलिसी लिए हुए 2 yr. हो गए हैं। प्लीज गाइड कीजिए।

comments.text:
Dear Madam,

I had an HDFC ERGO Health Suraksha plan (family floater) for the past 4 years, with a sum insured of ₹5,00,000. The annual premium was ₹21,000, and the insured ages are 46, 45, and 11.

In 2023, I underwent spine surgery (C3 to C7 laminectomy surgery) and received a claim under this policy. However, when I went to renew it this time, I found that my existing policy had been discontinued and replaced with the Optima Restore plan, for which they are now demanding a premium of ₹34,000.

I tried to port my policy to Niva Bupa, but they informed me that I am not eligible for porting. I do not want to take the Optima Restore plan. Instead, I am interested in the Optima Secure plan.

Can I switch to a better insurance company? Also, I would like to add the "Not Payable Items Add-on" to my policy.

Please provide detailed advice on my options.
comments.author: @namaskarbandu

comments.text: You can try migrating to Optima secure. Please email them, they will assist
comments.author: @GurleenKaurTikku
